form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, came from midfield; 3rd of 14 at Dubbo Super 3yo+ Mdnsw on March 15 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Sir Herridah with 58.5kg at $9. Second-up sat on speed throughout when 3rd of 11 at Muswellbrook Mdn-Sw on April 6 over 1450m, on a slow track; 2.5 len behind Think Back carrying 58.5kg at $8. SCRATCHED.

Likely to hold the good form and play a major role again.
